title: CVE-2026-15663 Ninja Forms <= 3.14.9 - Authenticated (Administrator+) SQL Injection via Import File 'settings' Key
sigma_rule:
title: SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-15663 Ninja Forms  3149 - Authenticated Administrator SQL Injection via
id: a3fde99c-ea98-57f7-8e03-290ade05c964
status: experimental
description: |
    Detects exploitation attempts related to CVE-2026-15663 (Web Application).
    Generated by CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX v166.2.
    Severity: LOW | Class: SQLI
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-15663
author: CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX Detection Engineering
date: 2026/07/24
modified: 2026/07/24
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
logsource:
    category: webserver
    product: generic
detection:
    selection:
        cs-uri-query|contains:
            - "' OR 1=1"
            - "UNION SELECT"
            - "'; DROP TABLE"
            - "1=1--"
            - "benchmark("
            - "sleep("
            - "0x"
        sc-status|contains: '500'
    filter_legitimate:
        cs-uri-stem|startswith: '/api/search'
    condition: selection and not filter_legitimate
falsepositives:
    - Web application firewall test traffic
    - Vulnerability scanner activity
level: low
kql_query:
// SENTINEL APEX — CVE-2026-15663 — Anomalous Activity Detection
// Product: Web Application | Generated: 2026-07-24T10:31:26Z
let lookback = 1d;
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID in (4625, 4648, 4728, 4740, 4776)
| summarize FailureCount = count(), DistinctTargets = dcount(TargetUserName)
    by IpAddress, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where FailureCount > 10 or DistinctTargets > 5
| extend Severity = "MEDIUM", CVE = "CVE-2026-15663", RuleSource = "SENTINEL-APEX"
| order by TimeGenerated desc
suricata_rule: alert http $EXTERNAL_NET any -> $HTTP_SERVERS $HTTP_PORTS (msg:"SENTINEL-APEX CVE-2026-15663 Exploitation Attempt - SQLI"; flow:established,to_server; content:"UNION SELECT"; nocase; content:"--"; distance:0; nocase; threshold:type threshold, track by_src, count 3, seconds 60; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:3426461; rev:1; metadata:created_at 2026-07-24, source SENTINEL-APEX-v166.2;)
_notice: Detection rules require PRO subscription. Subscribe at intel.cyberdudebivash.com/upgrade.html
